The post Portrayal Of Guilt – “Object Of Pain” & “Death From Above” appeared first on Stereogum.
full_text:
In exactly one month, the heavy, discordant Texan weirdos Portrayal Of Guilt will drop their new album ...Beginning Of The End. They announced the album by sharing two extremely nasty singles, "Ecstasy" and "Human Terror," at the same time. Now, they've hit us with another two-piece. 

The new POG tracks "Object Of Pain" and "Death From Above" both have videos from past collaborator Craig Murray. "Object Of Pain" starts out as murky, gothy post-punk before building into a spooky, clangy metal rager. "Death From Above" is heavier from the outset. It has an absolutely mean motherfucking riff and vocals that sound like evil-wizard chants. Check out both songs below.

...Beginning Of The End is out 4/24 on Run For Cover.
